Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. IAN ROSS OF KEESAL YOUNG & LOGAN, TEL. NO. 398-6000 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INCORPORATED'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)

Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Continued To Sep-06-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC., BARI HAVLICK and PAUL OKONOSKI'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to September 6, 2013, per order of the presiding judge, because Judge Miller recuses herself from this case. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
